description: Python files must not exceed 1000 lines
check: find modules/ -name "*.py" -exec sh -c 'lines=$(wc -l < "$1"); if [ "$lines" -gt 1000 ]; then echo "$1: $lines lines"; fi' _ {} \;
fix: Refactor into smaller modules with clear single responsibilities. Target ~400-500 lines.
Catch specific exceptions or use except Exception as e: with logging
Log the exception or re-raise. Never silently swallow exceptions.

description: Entry scripts must support --debug and --verbose flags
check: for f in run.py; do rg -q "debug" "$f" && rg -q "verbose" "$f" || echo "MISSING: $f"; done
fix: Add --debug (logging.DEBUG) and --verbose (logging.INFO) options to all entry scripts

description: No hardcoded host/port values in module code
fix: Move hardcoded values to config/settings/*.yaml or config/.env
